qa_summary: gemini-3.1-flash-image: ALL 10/10 PASSED. Pin 1: 5/5, Pin 2: 5/5. No gibberish, no typos, no missing text, no characters. Dramatic improvement over Imagen 4 (2/8).

best_pin1.note: Clean architectural house silhouette background, frosted glass card, navy+teal palette — strongest visual hierarchy

best_pin2.note: Split-screen with diagonal slash, winner badge prominent, navy+mint green — cleanest comparison layout

ready_note: All 10 passed automated QA. gemini-3.1-flash-image is the recommended model for Pinterest pins going forward.
